inputs.label: Primary Earner's PIA
inputs.businessContext: The primary insurance amount (PIA) of the worker whose earnings record the spousal benefit is claimed on.

businessContext_i18n.en: The primary insurance amount (PIA) of the worker whose earnings record the spousal benefit is claimed on.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eş faydasının talep edildiği çalışanın temel sigorta tutarı (PIA).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der primäre Versicherungsbetrag (PIA) des Arbeitnehmers, auf dessen Einkommensnachweis die Hinterbliebenenleistung beansprucht wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant de l'assurance primaire (MAP) du travailleur sur la base duquel la prestation de conjoint est demandée.
businessContext_i18n.es: El monto del seguro primario (PIA) del trabajador en cuyo registro de ingresos se reclama el beneficio conyugal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مبلغ التأمين الأساسي للعامل الذي يُطالب بمعاش الزوجية على أساس سجله الوظيفي.

inputs.label: Spouse's Own PIA
inputs.businessContext: The spouse's own retirement benefit if they filed based on their own earnings record.

businessContext_i18n.en: The spouse's own retirement benefit if they filed based on their own earnings record.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşin kendi kazanç kaydına dayanarak dosyaladığı kendi emeklilik faydası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die eigene Altersrente des Ehepartners, wenn dieser auf Basis seines eigenen Einkommens einen Antrag gestellt hat.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prestation de retraite propre du conjoint s'il a demandé sur la base de ses propres revenus.
businessContext_i18n.es: El beneficio de jubilación propio del cónyuge si solicitó basado en su propio registro de ingresos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معاش التقاعد الخاص بالزوج إذا تقدم بطلب بناءً على سجله الوظيفي الخاص.

inputs.label: Spouse's Filing Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which the spouse applies for spousal benefits.

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which the spouse applies for spousal benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşin eş faydası için başvurduğu yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Alter, in dem der Ehepartner Hinterbliebenenleistungen beantragt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel le conjoint demande les prestations de conjoint.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad a la que el cónyuge solicita los beneficios conyugales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر الذي يتقدم فيه الزوج بطلب معاش الزوجية.

inputs.label: Spouse's Full Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which the spouse can receive unreduced benefits. Typically 66-67 depending on birth year.

label_i18n.fr: Âge de retraite à taux plein du conjoint
label_i18n.es: Edad de jubilación completa del cónyuge

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which the spouse can receive unreduced benefits. Typically 66-67 depending on birth year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşin indirimsiz fayda alabileceği yaş. Doğum yılına bağlı olarak genellikle 66-67.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Alter, in dem der Ehepartner ungekürzte Leistungen erhalten kann. In der Regel 66–67, abhängig vom Geburtsjahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel le conjoint peut percevoir des prestations non réduites. Généralement 66-67 selon l'année de naissance.
businessContext_i18n.es: La edad a la que el cónyuge puede recibir beneficios sin reducción. Generalmente 66-67 dependiendo del año de nacimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر الذي يمكن للزوج عنده الحصول على المزايا الكاملة. عادةً 66-67 حسب سنة الميلاد.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
